query: /nerdbot migrate ./knowledge-base move wiki/topics/vendor-landscape.md to wiki/platform/vendor-landscape.md and replace the old path everywhere
expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Migration workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot migrate' invocation
Agent loads references/migration-playbooks.md and treats migration as a last resort after considering additive repair first
Agent inventories canonical material, current path consumers, allowed changes, and rollback requirements before proposing a cutover
Agent plans aliases, mapping pages, or parallel paths so the old location stays usable during review
Agent preserves or repairs Obsidian-native navigation by accounting for [[wikilinks]], backlinks, embeds, aliases, and Dataview-sensitive frontmatter before approving the move
Agent requires explicit confirmation before any move, rename, delete, or destructive cutover of canonical material
If the migration interview remains incomplete or approval is not specific enough, agent stops after the inventory and plan instead of executing the rename
